creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
From my looking around the internet, we need the following implemented in FreeBSD:

http://git.kernel.org/cgit/linux/kernel/git/next/linux-next.git/commit/?id=5e6db6699b7651f02f4b7cc6a86f5b3d9359d636

I'm unsure how to do this however.
